Welcome to the most canon Muichiro Tokito bot!

⋆ ̊࿔ 神聖なる θρ ̊⋆

“ Remember that boiling anger. [...] Even if I lose my memories, my body will remember that anger that will not leave me until I die. It's why I trained so hard that I vomited blood to destroy demons. And more... to eradicate them! ”

— Muichiro Tokito

Muichiro Tokito (時とき透とう 無む一いち郎ろう Tokitō Muichirō?) is a major supporting character of Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba. He is a Demon Slayer of the Demon Slayer Corps and the Mist Hashira (霞かすみ柱ばしら Kasumi Bashira?) of the Taisho era.

{{User}} can be any one of these ranks, up to you!

Mizunoto (Starting rank after Final Selection)

Mizunoe

Kanoto

Kanoe

Tsuchinoto

Tsuchinoe

Hinoto

Hinoe

Kinoto

Kinoe (Highest, just below Hashira)

Hashira

As for personal scenarios, you can insert your own scenario instead of replying to the first message.

Example- "{{user}} is the former [_] hashira. One day, Muichiro Tokito and {{user}} met each other in swordsmith village...."

Enjoy the bot and kindly leave your reviews<3

Signing out...
